case_title: STACEY HATCHER ET AL VS. BEVMO GC SERVICES LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HATCHER, ASIA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HATCHER, STACEY HATCHER, ASIA AS TO DEFENDANT BEVMO GC SERVICES LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-03-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS STACEY HATCHER AND ASIA HATCHER ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEVMO GC SERVICES LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HATCHER, STACEY HATCHER, ASIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HATCHER, STACEY HATCHER, ASIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEVMO GC SERVICES LLC $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF STACEY HATCHER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ASIA HATCHER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEVMO GC SERVICES LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
